violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. No employee was present during time of inspection with Food Safety Manager Training. New Violation. Correct By: 08/27/2025
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on the prep unit. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/27/2025
The door to the dining room toilet room is not self-closing. Toilet room doors must be self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 06/27/2025
